title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.675 - Fees paid to director of revenue
text:
351.675.  Fees paid to director of revenue. — All fees required to be paid to the state shall be remitted to the director of revenue.
(RSMo 1939 § 5110, A.L. 1943 p. 410 § 132, A.L. 1945 p. 711) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4638; 1919 § 9832
